channel.title: Poznan Studies in Contemporary Linguistics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Poznan Studies in Contemporary Linguistics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Liljana Mitkovska, Eleni Bužarovska, Fevzudina Saračević DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: A different kind of phrasal comparatives with a non-transformational Schönfinkelization in semantic composition: the case of Jordanian Arabic
item.description: Article by Liljana Mitkovska, Eleni Bužarovska, Fevzudina Saračević DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2024-0005

item.title: On the relation between negation and phases
item.description: Article by Liljana Mitkovska, Eleni Bužarovska, Fevzudina Saračević DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2023-0092

item.title: Aspects of pitch in textsetting: a suprasegmental analysis of two Turkish versions of Franz Schubert’s Ellens Gesang III (D. 839)
item.description: Article by Liljana Mitkovska, Eleni Bužarovska, Fevzudina Saračević DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2024-0031

item.title: The role of biased polar question particles in discourse: the case of Macedonian zar and neli
item.description: Article by Liljana Mitkovska, Eleni Bužarovska, Fevzudina Saračević DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/psicl-2023-0089
